# AR Events & Wedding Planner

> Premium event planning and wedding services in Muzaffarpur, Bihar, India. Serving clients since 2013.

## About

AR Events & Wedding Planner is a premier event planning company based in Muzaffarpur, Bihar with a service area covering Greater Noida, UP and major cities across Bihar. Founded in 2013, we specialize in creating unforgettable celebrations through meticulous planning, creative design, and flawless execution.

## Services

- **Wedding Planning**: Complete wedding planning and decoration services including venue selection, catering, photography, bridal styling, and day-of coordination. Packages from INR 85,000.
- **Anniversary Celebrations**: Romantic anniversary party planning with theme customization, memory slideshows, photography, and entertainment. Packages from INR 25,000.
- **Corporate Events**: Professional corporate event management including stage & AV setup, branding, live streaming, guest registration, and post-event analytics. Packages from INR 45,000.
- **Birthday Parties**: Creative birthday party planning for kids and adults with themed decorations, entertainment, DJ services, catering, and photography. Packages from INR 35,000.
- **Cultural Events**: Cultural event organization with traditional decorations, artist management, stage design, and cultural performance coordination. Packages from INR 55,000.
- **Religious Ceremonies**: Religious ceremony and puja planning with priest coordination, sacred ritual management, ceremonial decorations, and protocol adherence. Packages from INR 40,000.
- **Award Ceremonies**: Award ceremony event planning with stage lighting, sound design, ceremony coordination, and media coverage. Packages from INR 55,000.

## Service Areas

- **Primary Office**: Nirala Nagar, P&T Chowk, Muzaffarpur - 842001, Bihar, India
- **Service Area**: Greater Noida, UP & all major cities in Bihar including Patna, Gaya, Bhagalpur, Bihar Sharif, Madhubani, Darbhanga, Arrah, Motihari, Purnia, and Saharsa
- **Destination Events**: Available across India
